name: codex
description: AncientPantheon Codex TypeScript stack — workspace root for @ancientpantheon/arweave-core (framework-agnostic Arweave protocol), @ancientpantheon/codex (consumer-facing multi-chain aggregator), and the internal codex-core / codex-ui / codex-ouronet / codex-arweave modules.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/arweave-core && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-core && node scripts/build-circular-pair.mjs && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-arweave && npm run build --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@ancientpantheon/arweave-core && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-core && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ui && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-arweave && npm run typecheck --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@ancientpantheon/arweave-core && npm run test --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-core && npm run test --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ui && npm run test --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet && npm run test --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-arweave && npm run test --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:watch --workspace=@ancientpantheon/arweave-core && npm run test:watch --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-core && npm run test:watch --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ui && npm run test:watch --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet && npm run test:watch --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-arweave && npm run test:watch --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace=@ancientpantheon/arweave-core && npm run clean --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-core && npm run clean --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ui && npm run clean --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-ouronet && npm run clean --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex-arweave && npm run clean --workspace=@ancientpantheon/codex
